query:
SELECT nombre, MIN(id) as keep_id, COUNT(*) as count
FROM clientes
GROUP BY nombre
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 344B2FJrSHdkSxo.0ab51ce41b50 --database bUSGvjzrZfvVXNhQ347wq4 --execute SELECT nombre, MIN(id) as keep_id, COUNT(*) as count
FROM clientes
GROUP BY nombre
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 5;
